tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: I'm almost done with the assignment and nothing else is urgent, so I should just finish this quickly before the 13:30 deadline.
I submitted the assignment right before the deadline, which feels safe but leaves me no buffer for unexpected issues. This rush was unnecessary since I had time earlier today.

desires: To hit 'submit' on this assignment before the clock hits 13:30 so I can claim I'm responsible and avoid any risk of a late penalty.
To get back to my phone or start a new task immediately after submitting, because sitting with the anxiety of 'almost done' feels unbearable right now.
To ignore the low-priority note tidying completely until Friday, since finishing it now would feel like wasted effort that doesn't boost my grades.

goals.description: Hit 'Submit' on the assignment immediately to lock in the grade and end this anxiety loop.
goals.rationale: Achievement drives me to secure the point now; my impulsive nature makes sitting with 'almost done' unbearable, and I want to avoid any friction or risk of a late penalty by just delivering the work instantly.

agent.last_reasoning: Goal g1 is locked; anxiety loop ends. I need to shift from grind to social recharge since my health/leisure weights are low but relationships matter for stress relief. Messaging now avoids friction later and secures my meal slot before energy dips further.
